Why engineers trust BQPhy®
  * Peer-reviewed quantum-inspired algorithms
  * Compatible with CUDA, ROCm & hybrid stacks
  * Trusted by Fortune 500 engineering teams


The definitive guide to quantum-inspired engineering workflows. Get more from your existing GPU stack while building tomorrow’s quantum advantage.
  * Quantum-inspired algorithms for real GPU workloads
  * Step-by-step migration to hybrid quantum workflows
  * Performance benchmarks vs classical solvers
  * BQPhy QuantumNOW integration playbook


![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/6a15d955627d4e791b197f9a_Cover.png)

Farewell to the software from Y2K era!
Traditional simulation algorithms, often developed decades ago, may not be optimized for the intricate challenges of modern engineering. By harnessing the power of quantum mechanics, BQPhy® unlocks the full compute power of today’s High-Performance Computing (HPC) infrastructure, allowing you to achieve more with less.  
  

10x faster results on current HPC
  * Accelerate simulations for faster decision-making
  * Achieve higher accuracy, do more with less 
  * Hybrid quantum-classical algorithms for precision and efficiency at scale 


![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67dba4e9226d4ae9991638c4_About%20us%20\(1\).png)
Do More With Less
Interface Features
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67dba4e9226d4ae999163917_calendar.svg)
Intuitive User Interface
BQPhy® offers a user-friendly interface that makes design simulation easy and accurate, without requiring any quantum knowledge from users
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67dba4e9226d4ae999163914_send%20\(1\).svg)
Easy Project Navigation 
Navigate projects effortlessly with an intuitive navigation bar for a smooth workflow.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67dba4e9226d4ae999163915_map-pin%20\(1\).svg)
Admin Control & Project Tracking
Manage multiple projects efficiently with admin access and real-time progress tracking across accounts. 
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67dba4e9226d4ae999163916_upload.svg)
Seamless File Uploads 
Easily upload and work with various file types, including Python, MATLAB, and more, for a streamlined experience. 
BQPhy®’s Algorithm outperform legacy methods
# BQPhy® QIO
[Fewer Iterations ](https://www.bqpsim.com/product-overview#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-0)[More Solutions](https://www.bqpsim.com/product-overview#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-1)[Faster Convergence  
](https://www.bqpsim.com/product-overview#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-2)
QIO Algorithm v/s Genetic Algorithms  

Reaches the optimal solution in one-fourth the number of iterations. 
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67dba4e9226d4ae9991638cc_graph-1.png)
QIO Algorithm v/s Genetic Algorithms  

QIO explores more solutions, requiring smaller populations for convergence. 
  * Ackley: QIO needs 100 iterations while GA needs 2,000 iterations (20× efficient).
  * Rosenbrock: QIO needs 200 iterations while GA needs 1,000.
  * Rastrigin: QIO needs 100 iterations while, GA needs 200.


![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67dba4e9226d4ae9991638cc_graph-1.png)
QIO Algorithm v/s Genetic Algorithms  

4x faster convergence as compared to genetic alogorithms 
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67dba4e9226d4ae9991638cc_graph-1.png)
Trusted by
**Accelerating the India Journey for Over 2,000 Global Businesses for 40+ Years**

Frequently asked questions  

What is BQPhy®?
BQPhy® is an advanced MBSE simulation platform developed by BQP, for fast andaccurate complex simulations powered by quantum algorithms and hybrid quantum-classical workflows.
What solvers are available on the BQPhy® platform?
The BQPhy® platform offers three core solvers:
  * Optimization Solver: Leverages Quantum-Inspired Evolutionary Optimization(QIEO) for mission-critical engineering and logistics. Commercially availablenow.
  * Physics-Based Solver: Focuses on multi-physics simulations (e.g., fluid dynamics, structural mechanics). Under R&D.  

  * Data-Driven Solver: Integrates AI/ML with quantum-inspired methods for predictive analytics. Under R&D.


Which solvers are currently available for commercial use?
Only the Optimization Solver is commercially available. The Physics-Based and Data-Driven solvers are in active R&D, with BQPhy® inviting collaborations to accelerate their development.
Who should use BQPhy®?
BQPhy® is ideal for simulation engineers to experience the power of quantum oncurrent HPCs. Organizations, Quantum researchers, Developers, Educators,interested in exploring quantum computing, running simulations, or integratingquantum solutions with classical systems may get in touch.
Go Beyond Classical Limits.
Explore with a commitment-free Proof of Concept.
